zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bradley於1680年出生在英國哈普爾阿頓時，他的父親William Bradley15歲，母親Mary Hills3歲。他於1716年2月17日與Elizabeth Dean在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 瑪麗 阿爾德馬利 煙雨 聖 多馬 馮 阿波斯特爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1719年住在英國英格蘭越可爾德斯費爾德。他去世於1767年12月22日享年87歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌聖 路加 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bradley于1680年出生在英国哈普爾阿頓时，他的父亲William Bradley15岁，母亲Mary Hills3岁。他于1716年2月17日与Elizabeth Dean在英国英格兰倫敦聖 瑪麗 阿爾德馬利 煙雨 聖 多馬 馮 阿波斯特爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1719年住在英国英格兰越可爾德斯費爾德。他去世于1767年12月22日享年87岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌聖 路加 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Bradley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places throughout England named Bradley, from Old English brād ‘broad’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Scottish: habitational name from Braidlie in Roxburghshire.
Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Brolcháin ‘descendant of Brolacháin’, a diminutive of the personal name Brólach, compare Brawley . This was a learned family.

variants.name: Brawley
meanings: Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Brólaigh ‘descendant of Brolach’, a personal name possibly derived from brollach ‘breast’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

historicEvents.title: Gregorian Calendar is Adopted
historicEvents.description: Gregorian calendar was adopted in England in 1752. That year, Wednesday, September 2, 1752, was followed by Thursday, September 14th, 1752, which caused the country to skip ahead eleven days.

historicEvents.title: Seven Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Seven Years' War began as a North American conflict then stretched between England and France. England, along with allies, battled France in America, India, and Europe, making it arguably the first global war. The conflict ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris in 1763 and England was victorious. The Seven Years' war ultimately led to discontent in the colonies and the American Revolution.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bradley was born in 1680, in Alton, Hampshire, England, his father, William Bradley, was 15 and his mother, Mary Hills, was 3. He married Elizabeth Dean on 17 February 1716, in St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas the Apostle, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Huddersfield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom in 1719. He died on 22 December 1767, at the age of 87, and was buried in Saint Luke Churchyard, St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bradley est né en 1680, à Alton, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, William Bradley, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mary Hills, avait 3 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Dean le 17 février 1716, à St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas the Apostle, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Huddersfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1719. ja.lifeSummary: William Bradleyが1680年にイギリスハンプシュアイアアルトンで生まれた時，父William Bradleyは15歳，母Mary Hillsは3歳であった。1716年2月17日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト マリー アルデルマリー ウィス スト ソマス ス アポストルでElizabeth Deanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1719年にはイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハッドエルスフィールドに住んでいた。彼は1767年12月22日に87歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト バーソロメウ ビー ス ロイアル エクスチャンッジサイント ルク チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Luke Churchyard, St Bartholomew by: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창 세인트 루크 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: William Bradley(이)가 1680년 영국 함프실르 알턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bradley(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Hills(은)는 3세였다. 그는 1716년 2월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 알더마이 위스 스트 톰아스 테 아포스틀에서 Elizabeth Dean(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1719년도에 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 허더스필드에서 살았다. 그는 1767년 12월 22일 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창 세인트 루크 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bradley родился в 1680 г. в местности алтон, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Bradley было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Hills, 3. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Dean 17 февраля 1716 г. в местности ст мэри алдирмэри вит ст томас т апостл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности худдирсфиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1719 году. Он умер 22 декабря 1767 г. в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт люк чурчярд, ст бартоломю би т рояль эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.London St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas: St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas the Apostle, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Saint Luke Churchyard, St Bartholomew by: Saint Luke Churchyard, St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bradley nació en 1680, en Alton, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Bradley, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Mary Hills, tenía 3 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Dean el 17 de febrero de 1716, en St Mary Aldermary with St Thomas the Apostle, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Huddersfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1719. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1767, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Saint Luke Churchyard, St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
